executives.name: Ashley Heppenstall
executives.background: Mr. Heppenstall has over 30 years of experience in the oil and gas and resource sectors. He was the President and CEO of Lundin Petroleum AB from 2002 to 2015.

board_of_directors.name: Donald Charter
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Charter is a professional director with extensive experience in the mining industry and capital markets. He has served on numerous public company boards.
